release_label: Decision and Judgment Substrate Tranche SON-379 and Execution Workbench Tranche SON-384 2026-04-03

notes: This bundle captures SON-379 tranche 2, extending the decision and judgment substrate with operator-facing overview, evidence, candidate queue, compare, and surface-pack panels over canonical judgment carriers.

It also captures SON-384 tranche 1, adding a mission-scoped execution workbench surface and route that consume the canonical execution substrate for active work, event trails, queue state, interventions, runtimes, and agents.

Source-run compare versus decision-and-judgment-substrate-tranche-son-379-2026-04-02: issue_start stayed on SPC-1; mission_start advanced to fresh-acpx-20260403002332-d6c113; exploratory advanced to fresh-acpx-20260403002940-75d9cc.
